verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
verse.verse_2: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
verse.verse_3: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
